detail.description:
A major collaboration update with the legendary Ragnarok Online is now available! In this collaboration, players can enjoy a variety of new content, including special characters such as S+ [Evo] Swordman, who can be upgraded to S+ [Legendary] Lord Knight.

Journey through the classic Prontera Map, complete with familiar background music that brings the nostalgic world of Ragnarok back to life.

There are also many special items to collect, including Poring Dice and Lunatic Dice, S+ Pendants such
detail.recentChanges:
- New Map “Zero Gravity"
- New Premium Pass
- New Live Calendar
- New Dice Skill
- New Characters & New Pendants
- Bug Fixes & System Performance Optimizations
